category_sources: Official CAIDA page at https://www.caida.org/catalog/software/scamper describes scamper network measurement software.
source_facts.description: Advanced traceroute and network measurement utility.
display_name_sources: Official CAIDA page uses the project name scamper.
docs_sources: Official CAIDA manual PDF documents the scamper command.
source_facts.homepage is the official CAIDA scamper software page.
repo_sources: Official CAIDA project page provides source archives but no official source-control repository URL was identified, so repo is null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies advanced traceroute and network measurement utility.
source_facts.executables lists scamper and multiple sc_* network analysis tools.
